statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: The input is a root of a binary tree, where each node contains a value and a left and a right child. You should return the root of the tree with all nodes from a given target node inserted as a subtree in a given position.

constraints.description: Target node to insert as a subtree
Position to insert the target node as a subtree

examples.explanation: Insert target as a subtree at position

hints.text:
First hint text: Find the target node in the tree and remove it.
Second hint text: Find the position in the tree where you want to insert the target node and add a subtree of it.

functionSignature.python: def insertIntoMaxTree(self, root: TreeNode, insert: TreeNode) -> TreeNode:
